description: Regolith filter that generates translationKeys.generated.json by merging vanilla bedrock-samples translations with pack .lang files.

vanillaLangUrl.description: URL to fetch the vanilla en_US.lang file from.

cacheMaxAgeHours.description: How long (in hours) to keep the cached vanilla .lang file before re-fetching.

outputJsonPath.description: Output path for the generated JSON map (key → resolved string), relative to the Regolith temp directory.

langFiles.description: Pack .lang files to merge on top of vanilla (in order). Relative to the Regolith temp directory. Later files override earlier ones.
